$description: Avatar Add Button - A circular button with a plus icon for adding users to avatar groups

$component.name: Avatar Add Button
$component.description: A circular button component with a plus icon, used to add new users to contexts where avatars are displayed
$component.structure: Two-layer design: outer container circle + inner content area for sophisticated hover effects

sizes.xs: 24px container, 16px icon - Compact for tight spaces
sizes.sm: 32px container, 16px icon - Standard for avatar groups

states.default: Clean, subtle appearance with neutral gray border
states.hover: Light gray background with 'Add user' tooltip
states.focus: Primary color border with focus ring for keyboard navigation
states.disabled: Reduced visual weight with subtle border

accessibility.label: Add user
accessibility.keyboardNavigation: Full support with visible focus states
